name: aurora-ai-shimmer
title: Aurora AI Shimmer
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native shimmer parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora AI Shimmer.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/shimmer.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-components`.
